hero.subhead: Paste a job. We'll write a resume and cover letter that earn the interview — every claim backed by evidence from your career.

login.title: Welcome back.
login.subtitle: Sign in to pick up where you left off.

signup.title: Create your account.
signup.subtitle: 2 free tunings, no card required. Cancel anytime.

footer.tagline: tune your application to every job.
footer.stay_updated_body: Get career tips and product updates.

dashboard.subtitle: Paste a role below to start a new tuning.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Account preferences, subscription, voice and data.

sections.voice_sub: How Retuned sounds when writing as you.
sections.honesty_sub: How boldly we claim your achievements.
sections.culture_sub: Work style preferences that shape every tuning.
sections.workspaces_sub: Share a Retuned workspace with your team. The active one scopes the dashboard.
sections.language_sub: Choose how Retuned talks to you.
sections.ai_keys_sub: Bring your own Anthropic or OpenAI key.

settings.danger_zone_sub: Permanently delete your account and every tuning.
settings.delete_irreversible: This permanently deletes all your data. This cannot be undone.

settings_voice.title: Writing voice
settings_voice.subtitle: Your voice fingerprint captures how you naturally write. Every tuning uses it to sound like you, not like a template.
settings_voice.auto_update_note: Updates automatically as you upload documents and complete tunings.
settings_voice.empty_title: No voice fingerprint yet. It builds automatically during your first tuning.

settings_honesty.title: Claim calibration
settings_honesty.subtitle: Tracks how your claims perform over time. When a claim type has low trust, we ask for stronger evidence before using it prominently.
settings_honesty.no_data: No calibration data yet. It builds as you complete tunings and log outcomes.
settings_honesty.trust_note: Log your interview outcomes to keep trust levels accurate. The more feedback you give, the better Retuned calibrates your claims.

settings_culture.title: Cultural preferences
settings_culture.subtitle: Tell us how you like to work. We use this to match your tone and framing to roles that fit your style.

settings_data.title: Privacy & data
settings_data.subtitle: Export a copy of your data or delete your account. Your profile, tunings, and evidence are yours.
settings_data.export_body: Download a copy of everything: your profile, tunings, and evidence graph.
settings_data.retention_body: Your data is stored securely and retained for as long as your account is active.
settings_data.retention_profile: Profile data: retained until account deletion
settings_data.retention_generations: Tunings: retained for 90 days after creation
settings_data.privacy_policy_body: Review our privacy policy to understand how we collect, use, and protect your data.
settings_data.deletion_note: For data deletion requests, please delete your account from the main settings page.

refusal.title: We can't ship this credibly.
refusal.body: We reviewed your profile against this role and couldn't write something we'd stand behind. Here's why, and what to do next.
refusal.contest_body: Every refusal is contestable. We commit to a 30-day human-review SLA.

titles.hidden_disqualifier_blocker: Hard requirement we can't credibly satisfy
titles.fabrication: We'd have to invent something that isn't in your profile
titles.voice_drift: Drafts drifted away from your natural voice
titles.ats_coverage_below_floor: ATS coverage fell below the safety floor
titles.outcome_below_floor: Predicted outcome fell below the credibility floor

next_steps.hidden_disqualifier_blocker: Resolve the disqualifier the JD requires before re-applying.
next_steps.fabrication: Add concrete evidence to your profile - real numbers, real project names, real tools.
next_steps.voice_drift: Refresh your voice fingerprint with 5–10 sentences of your most natural writing.
next_steps.fairness_concern: Edit the language flagged below - it would carry bias in the package as written.
next_steps.ats_coverage_below_floor: Strengthen your skills section with the JD's tier-1 keywords expressed in your own words.
next_steps.cost_runaway: The cost ceiling fired. Try a tighter JD or contact support to raise the per-run budget.
next_steps.outcome_below_floor: Predicted callback fell below 20%. Either pick a closer-fit role or add evidence the JD's filters require.
next_steps.default: Review your profile and the JD; the system will try again with the changes.

onboarding.start_over_confirm_body: This will clear your profile and start fresh.
onboarding.complete_body: Your Retuned profile is ready. Opening your dashboard…
onboarding.intro_name: I'm Retuned. I'll read your resume and build a profile I can use to write honest, evidence-backed applications.
onboarding.intro_instruction: Upload your resume to get started.

toasts.understanding_regen_failed: Couldn't update your profile understanding — try again.
toasts.workspace_create_failed: Couldn't create the workspace — try again.
toasts.account_delete_failed: Failed to delete account. Please try again.
toasts.data_export_failed: Couldn't export your data — try again.
toasts.imported: Imported {exp} experience{exp_plural}, {skills} skills, and {proj} project{proj_plural} from your resume.

errors.offline_body: Retuned needs the network to read your job description, your evidence, and the AI providers. Re-establish a connection and we'll pick up where you left off.
